title.en: In a flash, half a year passed.

content.en:
In a flash, half a year passed.

this day.

Ye Tian had just finished scraping a ruined ruin when he received a summons from a True Monarch in the Void Heaven Temple, and the content of the summons was the news of the incarnation of a Dao Ancestor.

"The news of Tumen Dao Ancestor is really good news!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

Among the incarnations of the Four Great Dao Ancestors, the one that Ye Tian wanted to kill the most was the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor, one was that the relationship between the Tumen Dao Ancestor and the Void Heaven was very poor, and the two sides belonged to the enemy relationship;

According to the summons of the True Monarch of the Void Heaven Temple, the Dao Ancestor of the Tumen was in the remains of a force.

Because the True Monarch didn't dare to approach, he didn't confirm the situation of the ruins, and he didn't know how many Dao Ancestors had incarnated, he just sensed the existence of the Tumen Dao Ancestor, so he quickly left, not daring to approach, for fear of being killed by the Tumen Dao Ancestor casually.

But the True Monarch recorded the location of the relic of the power and summoned it.

Ye Tian could go to that power relic according to the location coordinates.

Generally speaking, such a relic of forces is very difficult to break down and takes a long time, plus it will take some time to reap the benefits of the ruin.

Previously, the reason why the Four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations ended their exploration in the Red Dragon Dojo so quickly was because the Red Dragon Dojo was destroyed, otherwise the Four Great Dao Ancestor incarnations would probably have stayed in the Red Dragon Dojo for a long time.

"Go directly to that power relic, I hope that while killing the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor, you can also have a big harvest!"

Ye Tian was looking forward to it.

-------------

Battlefield relics, Sky Splitting Sect relics.

This is a Lower Triple Heaven Force, but it is not weak, second only to the Middle Triple Heaven Force, because the Heaven Splitting Sect is the top Triple Heaven Force, and it is not too far away from a Middle Triple Heaven force like the Quadruple Heaven.

Under normal circumstances, an ordinary Dao Ancestor plus hundreds of True Ancestors could be called the Triple Heaven Force.

In the chaos, many Dao Ancestor forces, that is, the top powers, can be regarded as Triple Heaven forces.

But the Heaven Splitting Sect was different, it not only had one Dao Ancestor, but multiple Dao Ancestors, and the number of True Ancestors was far more than hundreds.

Nowadays, many people have a general understanding of the composition of the forces in the domain realm, and they also have a certain understanding of the Heaven Splitting Sect, so when the ruins of the Heaven Splitting Sect were exposed, some Dao Ancestor incarnations descended here.

However, there are too many opportunities for battlefield relics, so only a few Dao Ancestor incarnations have come here, and one of them is Tumen Dao Ancestor.

At this moment, Tumen Dao Ancestor was standing in front of a large array, studying this large array.

And there is a stone tablet in the great array, which is not an ordinary stone tablet, but an enlightenment tablet.

The Enlightenment Monument is very rare in the chaos, but this Enlightenment Monument is not ordinary, it is a very top Enlightenment Monument, and it can even have the effect of improving the comprehension of the Dao Ancestor.

In the chaos, many enlightenment monuments are too low-grade, and if the cultivation is high, it will be useless, and the enlightenment monuments suitable for true ancestors to participate in enlightenment are extremely rare, not to mention this kind of enlightenment monuments that are useful to Dao ancestors.

Such a top-notch Enlightenment Monument is undoubtedly a treasure for a force, and its value even surpasses that of Dao weapons.

There are many opportunities for the relics of the Heaven Splitting Sect, and the damage to this relic is not very serious, so a famous Dao Ancestor incarnate came here, constantly cracking the great array, plundering the opportunities here, and even some true monarchs also came here to join in the fun, but they only dared to collect some opportunities on the periphery.

The real core benefits are all attributed to the Dao Ancestor incarnations, and the Tumen Dao Ancestor chose this Enlightenment Monument, and other Dao Ancestors will not come to snatch it from him, after all, it is not for nothing that there is an opportunity to compare or even surpass this Enlightenment Monument.

"Soon, this great array has been analyzed, and in a few years, I will definitely be able to complete the analysis, so as to crack the great array and take away this top enlightenment monument!"

Tumen Daozu said excitedly.

However, what Tumen Dao Ancestor didn't know was that he had been targeted by Ye Tian.

Of course, even if he knew, he probably didn't care, because in his consciousness, Ye Tian couldn't kill his incarnation at all, so it wasn't a threat.

......

"It's here!"

Ye Tian kept shuttling, and during this period, he even used a few small worlds to complete the transfer and shuttle of the Great Realm, and finally quickly arrived at the ruins of the Heaven Splitting Sect, otherwise with his speed in the battlefield ruins, I am afraid it would take several days to be able to fly over slowly.

After all, the suppression of the battlefield relics is too great, and the speed of the True Monarchs is too slow, and it is impossible to cross the infinite territory by casually tearing the space like in the Quasi-Dao Realm.

"This Heaven Splitting Sect relic is so big!"

Ye Tian looked at the endless Heaven Splitting Sect in front of him and muttered.

Originally, the Heaven Splitting Sect should have been protected and hidden by the Mountain Protection Array, but now the Great Array is estimated to have been cracked by many Dao Ancestor incarnations, so the entire Heaven Splitting Sect can be seen at a glance, countless buildings have risen from the ground, located on the ground, and the core buildings are located in the Divine Mountains, each of which is incomparably magnificent and majestic.

Ye Tian is the reserve peak master of Black Wind Mountain, and he can also find out the introduction of the Heaven Splitting Sect from the classic book space.

As far as he knew, the Heaven Splitting Sect belonged to one of the decent factions, and it was very powerful, and it was attached to a Upper Triple Heaven force, and its background was relatively deep.

At its peak, the Heaven Splitting Sect had more than double digits of Dao Ancestors, and it was almost promoted to the Middle Triple Heaven Force.

As for the criteria for promoting the Middle Triple Heaven Force, Ye Tian didn't know very well, but it definitely had something to do with the peak combat power, and no matter how many ordinary Dao Ancestors estimated, they would not be able to be promoted to the Middle Triple Heaven Force.

Such a powerful Heaven Splitting Sect is more powerful than the Void Heaven Sect, and it has so many opportunities.

It's a pity that such a powerful force has now been reduced to a relic.

"I don't know if anyone from the Sky Splitting Sect survived, but even if they survived, they should have paid a heavy price, and they must still be sleeping, even forces like Black Wind Mountain haven't shown up!"

Ye Tian thought so.

Wow!

Ye Tian flew into the ruins of the Heaven Splitting Sect, looking for the traces of the Tumen Dao Ancestor.

This time, the Dao Ancestor incarnation who entered the ruins of the Heaven Splitting Sect was definitely not the only one Dao Ancestor of the Tumen Sect, so Ye Tian did not dare to directly sweep the entire Heaven Splitting Sect ruins with his divine sense, in case he angered other Dao Ancestor incarnations, he was afraid that he would be hunted down and killed by a large number of Dao Ancestor incarnations.

Therefore, Ye Tian could only use the Pupil Technique to look at the area and find the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor.

And it will take a little time!

Since Ye Tian didn't look for opportunities and didn't crack the big array, the speed of exploration was very fast, and he made a discovery after a while.

"Finally found the incarnation of the Tumen Dao Ancestor!"
